features: Primary BUILD object starts at v4.0.15 so the app cannot boot with the v4.0.13 badge.
Neutralizes older v4.0.13/v4.0.14 build label overrides by forcing the current label after all modules load.
Keeps Platform Command Center marketplace guard activity feed from v4.0.14.
Marketplace Activity shows guard accepted, en route, arrived, checking property, proof uploaded, completed, and report published.
